title: Cronos Group (CRON) Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Cronos Group maintains consensus analyst rating of Outperformer with average price target of $3.00. The consensus high price target is $3.50 from CIBC (May 15, 2024) while low target is $2.50 from Bank of America Securities (April 8, 2024). Current stock price was $2.63 as of May 15 close. Two analysts provide coverage with ratings. CIBC maintains Outperformer rating with $3.50 price target implying 34.55% upside potential. Bank of America Securities maintains Underperform rating with $2.50 price target suggesting 3.89% downside. Current price trading at $2.60 is out of analyst's predicted range. This indicates mixed sentiment among analysts on the stock's valuation. The divergence between analyst price targets reflects different views on company's growth prospects and ability to achieve profitability targets.
